# Om Sarraf

> FullStack Developer — shipping products that matter across web, mobile, AI agents, and automation. Worked with clients across the globe.

## Work Experience

### Full Stack Intern — Sarvam.ai
- Period: June 2025 – Present
- Location: Bangalore, India · Remote
- Working on the Agents Platform
- URL: https://sarvam.ai/

### Contract Full Stack Engineer — Cracked Devs
- Period: Feb 2025 – April 2025
- Location: Remote
- Shipping consumer-facing mobile apps
- Stack: React Native, Supabase
- URL: https://crackeddevs.com/

### Full Stack Intern — Stealth Startup
- Period: May 2024 – August 2024
- Location: Remote
- Contributed to GenAI MVP development with a small engineering team
- Built full-stack features using Next.js frontend and Django backend
- Implemented state management with Zustand and animations using Framer Motion
- Stack: Next.js, Django, Framer Motion, Zustand, React, Tailwind
- URL: https://vexio.in

### Founding Engineer — FOF.link
- Period: April 2024 – June 2024
- Location: Remote
- Led end-to-end development of the FOF.link platform as a solo engineer
- Architected and implemented a full-stack solution using Next.js and Neo4j
- Integrated authentication and user management using Clerk
- Stack: Next.js, Neo4j, Clerk, TypeScript, Tailwind
- URL: https://fof.link

## Projects

### Subly — Create Subliminals
- Description: An affirmations app that allows you to create your own subliminal messages and play them on your device. Acquired 1400+ users.
- Stack: ReactNative, Supabase, FastAPI, FFmpeg
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/subly-create-subliminals/id6741949047

### TopNode
- Description: Developed complete frontend for a Japan-based Web3 company as per their requirements.
- Stack: Next.js, TailwindCSS
- Live: https://topnode.app

### Volnex
- Description: Developed complete frontend with animations and pixel-perfect design for a Dubai-based forex company. Achieved 95+ Lighthouse score with CMS integration.
- Stack: Next.js, TailwindCSS, Shadcn, CMS
- Live: https://volnex.com

### Gamerge.ai
- Description: Enhanced platform with ThreeJS animations and redesign for a Dubai-based Web3 company, creating an immersive user experience.
- Stack: Next.js, ThreeJS, TailwindCSS, Shadcn
- Live: https://gamerge.ai

### Dishcovery
- Description: AI-powered kitchen companion that turns your ingredients into personalized recipe suggestions. Snap, share preferences, and discover your next meal.
- Stack: Next.js, Llama, Zustand, Shadcn, Tailwind
- GitHub: https://github.com/itsomsarraf/dishcovery-nextjs
- Live: https://dishcovery-nextjs.vercel.app

### Surveyor
- Description: Smart survey platform that generates AI-powered responses. Create surveys and get instant, realistic feedback for testing and prototyping.
- Stack: Next.js, Gemini, Zustand, Shadcn, Tailwind
- Live: https://surveyor.one

### ChatMark
- Description: Chrome extension to organize and tag your AI chat conversations from ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Mistral in one central hub.
- Stack: Plasmo, React, Tailwind
- GitHub: https://github.com/itsOmSarraf/chatmark
- Chrome Web Store: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/chatmark/ijghhkhojebllacdnpibmjodkgdfpnhm

### COVID Retweet Bot
- Description: Emergency response Twitter bot that amplified over 800+ verified COVID-19 healthcare essentials tweets during the pandemic crisis. Successfully served its purpose and was retired as resource demands decreased.
- Stack: Tweepy API, Python
- GitHub: https://github.com/itsomsarraf/COVID_RETWEET
- Twitter: https://x.com/covid_retweet

## Skills & Technologies

- Frontend: React, Next.js, React Native, TailwindCSS, Shadcn, ThreeJS, Framer Motion
- Backend: Django, FastAPI, Supabase, Neo4j
- AI/ML: Llama, Gemini, GenAI
- Tools: TypeScript, Zustand, Clerk, Plasmo, FFmpeg
- Other: Chrome Extensions, CMS Integration, Mobile Apps (iOS/Android)
